name: Rollback preserves audit and dialog focus
description: Proves destructive confirmation is accessible and rollback appends rather than erases history.

planSteps.description: Reach Deployed state as Release Manager
Focus Roll back, open the named confirmation dialog, press Escape, and reopen it
Assert Escape closes safely and focus returns to the Roll back control
Assert status is Rolled Back and all earlier audit events remain before one new deployment.rolled_back event
